title: UAE and Qatar Arrest Hundreds Over Online Videos of Iranian Attacks
summary_full: The authorities have made a wave of arrests to stop people posting footage of strikes, citing security risks. Experts also see a fear of damage to the countries’ image as safe havens.
summary_public: The authorities have made a wave of arrests to stop people posting footage of strikes, citing security risks. Experts also see a fear of damage to the countries’ image as safe havens.

IR.label: negative
